name.description: Full name of the buyer submitting the inquiry

country.description: Country or region where the buyer is based

product_category.description: Product type or category the buyer wants to source

estimated_quantity.description: Estimated order quantity or purchasing volume

service_needed.description: Main sourcing service requested by the buyer

message.description: Additional sourcing requirements, quality standards, timeline, or shipping details

status.description: Internal review status of the sourcing inquiry

created_at.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted
